text:
List of Acts
National Green Tribunal Act, 2010; Environment (Protection) Act, 
1986; Companies Act, 1956; Companies Act, 1913; Water (Prevention 
and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974; Code of Civil Procedure, 1908; 
Penal Code, 1860; Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973; Securities 
and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Fraudulent and Unfair 
Trade Practices Relating to Securities Market) Regulations, 2003.
